title: Pass font size feedback to UI agent

log.context: Pass font size feedback to UI agent

Both changes are applied. `.node-display-name` font-size is now `0.48rem` (down from `0.54rem`) and `.node-model-badge` is now `0.38rem` (down from `0.42rem`) in `/mnt/data/hello-world/congress.html`. No restart needed — the static file is served directly.
